steps.title: Use both locations
steps.content: The goal is to contrast where two specimens are located. A successful sentence must name Horridus and Dio, connect each one to its museum, and make the difference between Australia and Canada clear.

steps.title: Reject missing contrasts
steps.content: Choice A compares the specimens by period, not location. Choice B gives only Dio's museum, so there is no contrast. Choice C says Horridus is not the only museum specimen but gives no specific locations. The sentence with both specimens, both museums, and a contrast marker satisfies the goal. The answer is D.
